checks.name: topology_not_replaced_dense

checks.name: pressure_zone_svg_boundary
checks.detail: PZ-001 renders as bounding rect in SVG with #ff6b6b fill (COMPOUND_ZONE), label 'PZ-001 · 3 conditions', rx=12 rounded corners

checks.name: pressure_zone_id_resolution

checks.name: orchestration_renders_all_modes
checks.detail: Guided Actions render in DENSE, INVESTIGATION, BALANCED, BOARDROOM — 4 actions confirmed across all modes

checks.name: sw_intel_view_header
checks.detail: Dense/Investigation views show SW-INTEL module tag, qualification strip, and close button — replaces old 'Return to PI Core view' fallback

checks.name: domain_reasoning_contracts_exist
checks.detail: SW_INTEL_DOMAIN_REASONING_CONTRACTS defines 6 contracts: DELIVERY_FRAGILITY, COORDINATION_SATURATION, INTEGRATION_EXPOSURE, OPERATIONAL_TOPOLOGY, QUALIFICATION_EXPOSURE, PROPAGATION_RISK — each with resolve(fullReport, surface) returning 12 answers

checks.name: resolved_cognition_contract_memo
checks.detail: resolvedCognitionContract useMemo computes contract resolution when activeSurface is set — memoized on [activeSurface, fullReport, swIntelProjection]

checks.name: left_panel_cognition_state
checks.detail: ExecutiveInterpretation renders full contract when resolvedCognitionContract set: operational meaning, structural evidence, orchestration implications, qualification effect, evidence gaps, progression path

checks.name: left_panel_cognition_query
checks.detail: ExecutiveInterpretation renders query answer when cognitionQueryIndex set: question, derived summary, evidence rows, structural context, boundary disclosure

checks.name: right_panel_guided_queries

checks.name: query_answer_data_derived
checks.detail: DELIVERY_FRAGILITY query 'Why does backend originate delivery pressure?' returns data-derived answer with domain grounding (Q-01), 3 co-located signals — all from fullReport fields

checks.name: surface_activation_toggle
checks.detail: Click surface → activates cognition state. Click same surface → deactivates. Click different surface → switches. Left panel returns to standard interpretation on deactivate

checks.name: query_dismiss_flow
checks.detail: Click guided query → left panel shows answer. Click dismiss → left panel returns to contract view. activeQueryIndex cleared
